rule_name: Log4j Remote Code Execution (RCE) Exploitation Pattern
description: Detects potential exploitation attempts of vulnerable components targeting Log4Shell vulnerabilities via specialized JNDI lookup patterns in headers.
search_query: index=main sourcetype=_json | regex _raw="\$\{jndi:(ldap|rmi|ldaps|dns):.*}" | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, user_agent
